name: Palama Supermarket
tagline: Hawaii's favorite Korean grocery — legendary banchan counter, fresh kimchi, and hot plate lunches that rival any restaurant.
parking: Free lot on N King St
talkStory: Palama is where local Korean and mixed-plate families do their serious grocery shopping. The banchan counter is the star — fill a container with a dozen different Korean side dishes for just a few dollars. The in-house kimchi is made fresh and the hot plate lunches rival dedicated restaurants. The produce section has exceptional quality at prices that beat the big chains. Weekday mornings are best; weekends get packed.
